nodes.name: Parse & Classify Message
nodes.notes: Reads Bale updates and classifies each message (idea/fix/feature/commands).

nodes.name: Product Owner
nodes.notes: Validates ideas, bootstraps the repo + per-stack CI, and creates Trello tasks.

nodes.name: Daily Report
nodes.notes: Daily 9am per-task status report sent to the owner on Bale.

parameters.content:
## 1 — Product Owner
The single entry point. Polls Bale every minute, classifies each message, and drives the board.

**Idea** → validate → wipe board → bootstrap repo (`main`+`develop`, monorepo, per-stack CI) → generate atomic tasks.
**fix:/feature:** → add one task to the active project.
**/exit** wipes the board, **/report** sends an on-demand per-task report, **/help** shows usage.

The model layer goes through `claude-bridge.js` (Pro subscription).

## Daily report (cron 9am)
Walks every Trello column, counts 🔴 bugs / 🛠️ fixes per card, and sends a per-task status summary to the owner on Bale.
